text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Do you know anything about the
number 6000*6?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You see, when I texted Maruzen about the next
race, all I got back from her was that number...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's got to be something to do with the race. But...
it's not a time, or a distance... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I won't give up, though! It's precious advice from a friend, so I will figure it out!
